content:
If you’re using APA, be sure to [check in-text citation style / include a reference page].

⸻

✅ Summary & Suggestions

Overall, your essay has a strong foundation. I especially liked [specific strength]. To make it even better, I recommend focusing on [1–2 key improvements, e.g., clarifying the thesis, balancing comparisons, fixing transitions, etc.].

Keep up the good work—I’m looking forward to reading your final draft!

Best,
[Your Name]

⸻

🧠 Pro Tips:
• Balance praise and suggestions—make your peer feel supported but challenged.
• Be specific—not just “good job,” but why something works.
• Use professional tone and full sentences.
• Submit your letter via Canvas on time.

⸻

✅ Rubric (Total: 100 pts)
context: From document: ✅ Assignment 3A: Peer Review Letter – Compare & Contrast Essay — chunk 4 (chunk 4/11)
